title: Cast with WIDTH ignored forces wrong bit width conversion in version 4.100

features.name: cast expression with bit shift inside
features.description: Code should include a cast expression where a bit shift operation (>> or <<) is performed inside the cast parentheses, with the cast target being a fixed-width type

features.name: enum with cast expression using hex literal shift
features.description: Code should include enum values defined using cast expressions with right-shift operations on hex literals, where the enum base type is a typedef of specific width
